description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy to GitHub that triggers on push of tags matching *-r[0-9]+ and on workflow dispatch with a required tag input. The workflow should have three jobs: package-win64 and package-linux64 that build win64 and linux64 releases using separate build workflows, and create-update-release that drafts a GitHub release after the build jobs complete. The release job should checkout the repository, generate release text, stage and archive the build artifacts, and create or update the GitHub release with the generated text and artifacts.
